finding.summary: Excessive low-frequency content and high true peak relative to sample peak.
finding.probable_cause: Likely due to close microphone placement causing proximity effect, and presence of intersample peaks.
finding.confidence_reason: The spectrum shows 100 Hz at -18 dB vs 1 kHz at -24 dB and 4 kHz at -30 dB, a clear low-frequency bias. True peak is -5.5 dB while sample peak is -8.5 dB, indicating intersample peaks. However, only three frequency bands are available, limiting certainty.

proposal.reason: No FX chain exists on this track. The only available operations (volume, pan) cannot correct the spectral imbalance or improve the high-frequency content. Adding an EQ plugin (e.g., high-pass filter around 80-100 Hz and a gentle presence boost around 4 kHz) would be necessary to address the excessive low end and improve vocal clarity.
